center.name: 米沙鄢群島
center.summary: 米沙鄢群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括菲律宾针尾雨燕、Northern silvery kingfisher、Southern silvery kingfisher等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: talautensis, is native to the Visayas and Mindanao island groups of the Philippines, with a range extending to the Talaud Islands of Indonesia. T

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The northern silvery kingfisher (Ceyx flumenicola) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae that is endemic to the Philippines being found in the Visayas on the islands of Bohol, Leyte and Samar

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species and the northern silvery kingfisher, found in the Visayas, were formerly considered conspecific and called the silvery kingfisher.Its natural habitats are tropical moist lowland forests, streams and rivers. It is threatened by habitat loss

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines found in the Visayas on the islands of Tablas Island, Siquijor, Cebu and Romblon

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines found in the islands of Mindanao and Visayas
